title: LoopOver Orb Review Agent passed
summary: No configured hard blocker was found. Advisory findings, if any, stay advisory.
note: Predicted from the repo's public .loopover.yml gate config + safe defaults. The maintainer may have private dashboard overrides not reflected here, and the dual-model AI-consensus blocker is only evaluated on a real PR. The slop score is NOT evaluated pre-submission (it needs the diff content) and may still fail the real gate. The size-hold prediction uses changed FILE count only, not changed LINE count (line-diff stats are not available pre-submission), so it may under-predict a hold for a PR with many changed lines across few files. Every author is gated the same: a configured hard blocker fails the gate regardless of confirmed-contributor status (which affects only on-chain scoring).
